This is the fully side chain-protected 20-mer peptide IV (SEQ ID NO 1) with P1 = Boc and the C-terminus protected as OBzl. Product of step (g).
The final product of the convergent synthesis, obtained after global deprotection in step (h).
Intermediate obtained after removal of C-terminal and side-chain Bzl protecting groups but before final Boc removal.
